ops.body: Phase A1 shipped: experiment-at-home commit 4fda96a2ab06 "serve: IdleResource idle-unload lifecycle + ManagedServer.idle" — athome/idle.py (IdleResource[T]: single-flight use(), TTL sweep with drop-ref-before-unload, error-isolated run() reaper, discard()), ManagedServer.idle(*, ttl_s), tests/test_idle.py (15 tests), idle.IdleResource in the curated docs reference. CI green ×4; tag v0.9.1 pushed, release-pypi in flight. Review: 5 findings raised, 4 confirmed + fixed (reaper error isolation, docs reference entry, kw-only interval_s, run() coverage), 1 refuted (sweep-unload race — no await point in the real path). ManagedServer.ensure() verified to re-adopt a healthy surviving server, so a failed unload cannot double-spawn.
